---
title: "Getting started with jwdid"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting started with jwdid}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

`jwdid()` estimates Wooldridge's extended two-way fixed-effects model.

```{r, eval=FALSE}
m <- jwdid(lemp ~ 1, did::mpdta, ivar=countyreal, tvar=year,
           gvar="first.treat", never=TRUE)
jwdid_simple(m)
jwdid_event(m)
```

The R default `anticipation=0` corresponds to omitting Stata's option.
R `anticipation=k` corresponds to Stata `anticipation(k+1)`.
